title: The History of Don Quixote, Volume 1, Part 06
summaries: "The History of Don Quixote, Volume 1, Part 06" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is part of a novel originally published in 1605. The story follows Alonso Quijano, a man who reads so many chivalric romances that he loses his sanity and becomes the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his pragmatic squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on delusional adventures, mistaking windmills for giants and inns for castles, as he attempts to revive the age of chivalry in a world that has moved beyond it. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Spain -- Social life and customs -- 16th century -- Fiction
